'''8EX''' was one of the first [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2-series super battle droid]] to be produced by the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]], during the years leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|With these new battle droids we've build for you, Viceroy, you'll have the finest army in the galaxy|Poggle the Lesser (Flavour text for the card)|<ref name="TCG" />}}
8EX was mentioned in the first expansion for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Star Wars Trading Card Game]], ''[[Attack of the Clones (TCG)|Attack of the Clones]]'',<ref name="TCG" /> released in [[2002]].<ref name="forcenet">{{WebCite|url=http://www.theforce.net/ccg/story/aotc_trading_card_game_press_release_67446.asp|text=AOTC Trading Card Game Press Release|author=Thomas|date=2002-04-26|quote="…the TCG is scheduled to be on stores shelves on April 23."|archivedate=20160512090918}}</ref> The image for the card was a composite image of a super battle droid superimposed upon a background of the arena on Geonosis,<ref name="TCG" /> from the [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']],<ref name="AotC">{{Film|II}}</ref> upon which the expansion was based upon.<ref name="TCG" />
